creator: root@whorfin.sjca.edu
text:
When you do a `make install' in a gnu documentation directory, only
foo.info.gz is installed.  foo.info-1, foo.info-2, etc. will be ignored.

Fix: 

It looks like the problem is with bsd.info.mk, but I don't know BSD make
syntax well enough to suggest a patch.
How-To-Repeat: make install in any gnu documentation directory.
